seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: Conclude the email with "Looking forward to your response."
new_constraint: Conclude the email with the phrase "Thanks for your help."
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. Conclude the email with "Looking forward to your response." Conclude the email with the phrase "Thanks for your help."
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Reservations Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about room availability at your hotel for next weekend, specifically from [Start Date] to [End Date]. We are planning a family trip and are interested in booking a [Number] bedroom suite or a standard double room.

Could you please let us know if you have any rooms available during those dates and provide your current rates? Additionally, if you have any special packages or amenities available for weekend stays, please include those details as well.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks for your help.
